results.title: SnoopReport Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

•9 reviews

Snoopreport seriously comes in handy every time I’m looking to get some in-depth info on people I met online, both friends and potential partners. I truly love the simplicity of it, super easy to navigate and understand reports. The best feature, in my opinion, is the fact that you get reports on people indefinitely, so if anything changes in their social media actions, it will reflect on the report. All in all, the best Insta tracker app for its price.

Report

Dear Jane, We went ahead and lifted 3000 followings limit effective July 19th, 2023. Thank you again for your feedback and hope to see you back as a Snoopreport customer.

Thу tool that stands out in the market precisely by providing qualitative, rather than quantitative, analytics. With the help of data about liked hashtags and posts of followed users, you can gather valuable insights for both your business profile and the niche as a whole.

Report

Reliability

Report

 8 views

•6 reviews

This is the perfect tool for keeping up with what my favorite celebrities do on Instagram. I love being able to see what posts they like, who they follow, and how their interests change over time. I tested a couple other trackers, but Snoopreport was the most complete. Highly recommend if you’re curious about your favorite public figures!

Report

 5 views

•1 review

FAQ clearly states, as does the response to the review below, that any public account can be followed. However accounts with > 3000 followers cannot be followed, and apparently this is stated in the terms and conditions. Completely misleading information. I have requested a full refund.

Report

Hey everyone!  
  
With LLM SEO Report we built a very simple tool that lets your check what ChatGPT, Google Gemini and Claude think about your brand or your competitors. [...] Michi Huber
ButterDocs

ButterDocs

This looks great! LLM traffic is surging, so this is crucial.

How consistent are LLM's "opinions" about a certain product and how does this affect the reporting?

Caleb Okonkwo

Love this AI-powered SEO insights tool—it fits perfectly into content workflows. As someone building AI micro‑tools for creators, I'd love to hear how you balance depth vs readability in your reports?

Tony Novia

Hi Thomas, just a quick heads up. Just ran a report for rbr.com which is a media business website and it came back with a report for RBR (Retail Banking Research)

Just a heads up.

Thanks!

Kuldeep Kulshreshtha
UXArmy

UXArmy [...] It's a structured report that shows you what the most popular LLMs think about a brand, if they think it is popular, if they would recommend it (often not the same thing!) as well as what it knows about the official websites, important 3rd party websites in the space as well as related social media accounts that the LLMs find important.  
  
IMPORTANT: for generating this report is the LLMs are not using web search as a tool, they answer only based on their training material.  
  
This helps us to better understand what the LLMs think about a brand without any extra context that might influence them into one direction or another.  
  
At its core the reports from LLM SEO Report show you what the LLMs already know and think about a brand BEFORE they use web search.
